function.name: set_breakpoint
function.description: Set, delete, or toggle an ABAP debugger breakpoint. Use this only after explaining the debugging intent to the user. The caller may require user confirmation before execution.

program.description: Main program, class pool, or report name. If omitted, include is used as the main program.

include.description: ABAP include/program where the breakpoint line belongs.

breakpoint_type.description: S = session breakpoint, E = external breakpoint. Default S.

reason.description: Short visible intent explaining why this breakpoint is needed.
